nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for iterative refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as independent delegate requiring extensive correction
nodes.grounding_span: I have found AI to be more effective when I am a collaborative partner, guiding it through each step and making the corrections for each iteration of the process

nodes.label: AI as tool for routine administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI handling complex or sensitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for a variety of tasks, rewriting emails, analyzing, summarizing, and extracting information from government sources

nodes.label: AI reliability for complex scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: AI seems to fail alot in complex scheduling issues

nodes.label: AI use privacy due to workplace culture
nodes.label_negative: Open AI use in supportive culture
nodes.grounding_span: I have found that it is best if I keep my use of AI in my dailywork private

nodes.label: AI as learning tool to refine skills
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI as a tool to help me refine those skills

nodes.label: AI handling sensitive information (HIPAA/proprietary)
nodes.grounding_span: When there are tasks that involve HIPPA compliance or proprietary information, that is when I try not to use AI

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it goes faster when I do that myself

nodes.label: Professional satisfaction and creative focus
nodes.grounding_span: I am able to focus my time on problem solving and creative tasks that are much more satisfying for me

nodes.label: Skill growth and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I always look for ways to learn from AI

nodes.label: Compliance and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: show me how I may or may not be in compliance

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI is able to quickly summarize Executive orders

nodes.label: Frustration with AI in complex scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: It was frustrating because I would find an error, explain the error and where it was, and what the rules for that particular point were but the model could not recover

nodes.label: Caution about AI for sensitive data
nodes.grounding_span: When there are tasks that involve HIPPA compliance or proprietary information, that is when I try not to use AI

nodes.label: Optimism about AI's future evolution
nodes.grounding_span: It is my hope that AI continues to evolve and can help take over some of the more mundane reporting tasks

nodes.label: Resignation about workplace AI stigma
nodes.grounding_span: Due to this viewpoint, I have found that it is best if I keep my use of AI in my dailywork private

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative guidance — step-by-step correction
nodes.grounding_span: guiding it through each step and making the corrections for each iteration of the process

nodes.label: Learning-oriented reflection — extracting lessons from AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: understanding why my formula didn't work in Excel so that error doesn't occur again
